message:
feat(web): add IndexedDB cache utilities with quota error handling

Implements phage_explorer-rrqx.3:
- Add db-cache.ts with quota error detection (QuotaExceededError, code 22)
- Add safeCacheWrite with proper error reporting
- Add storage estimation via Navigator.storage API
- Update saveToCache to return CacheWriteResult with quota status
- Log cache stats on quota exceeded (dev mode)
- Export cache utilities from db module

Existing functionality verified working:
- Warm loads skip decompression (use cached bytes directly)
- Cache invalidates on hash mismatch
- Falls back to network on cache miss or quota error
